# Rajesh Sawant Portfolio

> Single-page portfolio for Rajesh Sawant, a Full-Stack Engineer focused on AI systems, knowledge graphs, production ETL, and modern Next.js applications.

## Summary

- Built with Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, and Framer Motion.
- Main sections: Hero, Experience, Projects, Skills, Research, and Contact.
- Portfolio content lives in `data/data.ts`.
- The contact form submits to `/api/contact`.

## Useful URLs

- `/`
- `/Rajesh_Sawant_Resume.pdf`
- `https://www.sudokn.com`
- `https://github.com/rajeshsawant98/travel-path`
- `https://sahana-drab.vercel.app/`
- `https://github.com/rajeshsawant98/sahana-backend`

## Contact

- Email: rajeshsawant98@gmail.com
- Location: Tempe, Arizona, USA
